title: austropeucedanum oreopansil
intro: Austropeucedanum oreopansil, also known as the Chinese angelica tree, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Austropeucedanum oreopansil include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions and infusions made from its roots and leaves, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory infections and menstrual disorders.
